'''Duros ale''' was a type of [[Ale/Legends|ale]] available in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="LE" /> It was served aboard the luxury [[Hovertrain/Legends|repulsortrain]] [[Gem of Alderaan]]<ref name="GA">{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}</ref> and at the annual [[Vor-cal Feast]] held aboard [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vycinyth]].<ref name="LE" />

==Appearances==
*{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}
